comments.text: This is hands down one of the most beautifully made and deeply moving documentaries I’ve ever watched. It masterfully balances the harsh reality of the economic collapse with the breathtaking beauty of Venezuela's land and the resilience of its people. Truly a masterpiece!

replies.text: Thank you for such a thoughtful watch — that balance between hardship and beauty was exactly what we hoped would come through. Which part of the landscape stayed with you the most?
